title: Asarca patagonica
taxonomy: Asarca patagonica is a species of freshwater snail, belonging to the family Lymnaeidae. It is a type of pulmonate gastropod mollusk that is endemic to the Patagonia region. This snail is classified within the genus Asarca, which is characterized by its distinctive shell shape and size. Asarca patagonica is further classified within the family Lymnaeidae, which includes other freshwater snails. The classification of Asarca patagonica reflects its unique characteristics and its specific geographical distribution.
